Most buyers never check this. 👀

A first-timer family can get up to $80k from the CPF Housing Grant, before EHG, Proximity or EC grants stack on top. That's real money toward your flat.

posts.caption:
Myth: the price you offer is the price you can borrow on.
Not true. Your loan and CPF only stretch to the bank's valuation.
Offer above it and that gap comes straight out of your own pocket.
Know the valuation before you sign anything.
link in bio
#singaporeproperty #propertysg #homeloan #cpf #buyinghome #valuation
